_comment: Frozen ORIGINAL crypto baseline (current core/sha256.inc + tls.inc PRF). The fixed comparison point for every variant. 86Box ground truth: 8088 @ 4772728 Hz, 1 tick = 54.9254 ms.
machine: ibmpc 8088 @ 4772728 Hz, no dynarec, CGA, 64 KiB

PRFALL.desc: TLS1.2 PRF master secret + key block (the always-runs symmetric handshake cost)

notes: PRF (master+keyblock) ~4.92 s is the dominant slice of the ~7.5 s CKE->Finished gap; the rest is the client Finished transcript hash + CKE build + transmit + server wait.
SHA-256 block ~745K cycles -- dominated by bit-at-a-time rotr32/shr32 and memory-to-memory 32-bit math.
Correctness gated host-side in unicorn vs OpenSSL (check-tls-prf vectors); device ck cross-checks (2368/2228 match host word-sums).
